creator: moro@race.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
Gimp 0.54.1 is obsoleted and tarball of its source files
needed by gimp port is removed from master site.

Fix: 

fortunatelly, developers' version is maintained by
erich@freebsd.org.
Considering that developers version is much different 
than 0.54.1 (e.g., it no longer need Motif)
and 1.0 will appear in near future,
the port should be replaced with gimp-devel port now,
I think.
